title: fumaria officinalis subsp. micrantha
intro: Fumaria officinalis subsp. micrantha, also known as small fumitory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the fumitory family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, due to the presence of alkaloids like fumaritine and fumaric acid. The health benefits of Fumaria officinalis subsp. micrantha include its ability to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and other skin issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Fumaria officinalis subsp. micrantha can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for internal use, or applied topically as a salve or cream for skin conditions.
